description: AI Receptionist channel settings for a single business channel. The record is unique per business and channel and stores the voice welcome message, selected voice, and text-to-speech tuning values used when the AI receptionist answers and speaks during a call.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the AI Receptionist channel setting row (e.g., "7b940b2b-6fd5-48b6-8bb6-2f6107ad8f64").

business_uid.description: Unique identifier of the business that owns this channel setting (e.g., "d290f1ee26c54").

channel_uid.description: Stable channel identifier within the business. For voice calls this is derived from the voice call setting UID (e.g., "voicecalls:setting_123").

welcome_message.description: Welcome message spoken when the AI receptionist answers this channel. Null or omitted values use the product default with the business name (e.g., "Hello, Welcome to Smith Legal, I'm a voice receptionist, any question or request I can help you with today?").

voice_id.description: Identifier of the ElevenLabs voice used by this AI Receptionist channel. Null or omitted values use the product default voice (e.g., "21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM").

voice_name.description: Display name of the selected ElevenLabs voice as shown in the settings UI. Runtime voice synthesis depends on `voice_id`; this field is a convenience snapshot for display (e.g., "Rachel").

voice_preview_url.description: Preview audio URL for the selected ElevenLabs voice, used by the settings UI to play a sample (e.g., "https://storage.googleapis.com/eleven-public-prod/premade/voices/preview.mp3").

tts_stability.description: ElevenLabs stability value for text-to-speech generation. Lower values sound more emotional and variable, while higher values sound more consistent. Null or omitted values use the product default (e.g., 0.5).

tts_speed.description: Speech speed multiplier for AI Receptionist text-to-speech generation. The settings UI uses a conservative call-quality range. Null or omitted values use the product default (e.g., 1.0).

tts_style.description: ElevenLabs style exaggeration value for text-to-speech generation. Higher values increase style intensity when supported by the selected voice. Null or omitted values use the product default (e.g., 0.0).

created_at.description: The date and time when the record was created, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2026-06-07T07:30:00Z").

updated_at.description: The date and time when the record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2026-06-07T07:35:00Z").

settings.welcome_message: Hello, Welcome to Smith Legal, I'm a voice receptionist, any question or request I can help you with today?
